title: csmp barebones
description: the csmp fanmade modpack for bad pcs
body:
### THIS MODPACK IS ALREADY OPTIMIZED
this is a version of my fanmade modpack for people who cant run the main one (i understand you im on a school laptop)

if your a csmp fan you will probobly enjoy this

the only modpack for csmp hasnt been updated from 1.19.2 so i did it my self so now you can have defile and arsenal and other mods it sadly doesnt have rats mischief or impaled since theyre on 1.19.2 as of now but they might be updated since doctorr4t posted something about modders being able to update the mods if they apply or something like that but it still has blast and enchancements 

this is a modpack inspired by the series called content smp and the fanmade modpack thats only on 1.19.2

this does not have any paid or private mods

if some mods update and i didnt update the modpack you can dm me in discord my username is olkascz#0000

[csmp ](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLejL0oSihczXRoCVX_Iawu3HE1CVf9j5K&si=FWa1Qt6C3VDHyBDd)
